acceptance.label: The final policy recommendation explains why commit-scope responsibility should remain with the agent or human rather than an automatic publish mode.
The repo guidance names strict `require` as the recommended default mode for normal PRISM agent work.
The rollout plan only keeps `auto` as a temporary migration aid, and explicitly removes it once strict `require` has been proven through dogfooding and validation.

payload.summary: Document strict `require` as the recommended default once the publish-state model is proven, and delete `auto` rather than keeping it as a normal mode because broad auto-commit behavior is too risky for multi-task agent work.
payload.title: Make strict require the default and remove auto after proven dogfooding
